This facility lets you conduct battles similar to Stadium
This facility holds battles for Pika Cup, Fancy Cup,
PokÃ© Cup, and Little Cup. Each cup has its own rules
The Pika Cup is open to PokÃ©mon level 15 to 20.
However, the total level of all three can't be higher
Also, certain exotic kinds of PokÃ©mon may not enter.
The Fancy Cup is open to baby PokÃ©mon level 25 to 30.
However, the total level of all three can't be higher
Also, very huge or very tall PokÃ©mon may not enter
The height limit is 2 meters, and the weight limit is 20
The PokÃ© Cup is open to PokÃ©mon level 50 to 55.
However, the total level of all three can't be higher
Also, certain exotic kinds of PokÃ©mon may not enter.
The Little Cup is open to baby PokÃ©mon at level 5
Choose three PokÃ©mon to enter a single battle,
or four for a double battle.
Also, in the Little Cup, moves that deal a set
amount of damage, like Dragon Rage and SonicBoom,
In Stadium Cups, there are several rules to keep in mind.
First, two PokÃ©mon in the same team can't be both
asleep or both frozen at the same time.
Also, you can't choose two of the same kind of
PokÃ©mon, or two PokÃ©mon holding the same item.
